api_access.conditions: API access is governed by separate Developer Agreement and Policy. Rate limits and tiers apply.

scrape_data.conditions: You may not scrape the Services without X's express written permission.

post_content.conditions: Content must comply with the User Agreement, X Rules, and applicable law. By posting, you grant X a broad license to use, reproduce, modify, and distribute your content.

read_content.conditions: Public content is viewable and searchable. Accessing non-public content requires authentication.

allow_training.conditions: X uses user data and content to improve services, including AI/ML features. Users may have some controls via privacy settings.

create_account.conditions: Users must agree to the User Agreement and comply with applicable policies and laws. Age restrictions apply.

make_purchases.conditions: Purchases subject to additional terms. Payment information required.
